purpose: Pin the offline replay fixture so the bridge feasibility check is reproducible, self-reference-free (DE-0132), rubric-free, and provably full-coverage. Wiring feasibility only — NOT an HBB-30 correctness/REC2 result.

question_context.note: neutral stuck-frame; NOT answer-aware; no rubric

corpus_rule: corpus = EXCLUSIVELY the adapted HBB-30 intermediate records. EGL ledgers (DESIGN_EVIDENCE_LEDGER, REVIEW_LEDGER, audit_backlog) NOT fed (no self-reference, DE-0132). records MUST be a non-empty list; records=None is forbidden (would default to load_corpus()).
coverage_rule_FIX1: call answer_question with force_include=[every fed record_id] and k=len(records); after the call assert set(retrieved_ids)==set(all record_ids). Any shortfall is LOGGED and FAILS the run (PROCESS-01: no silent cap). Coverage does NOT rely on token-overlap/stopword coincidence.
supersession_rule_FIX4: pass superseded={} explicitly so detect_supersession does not scan/inject tags over the HBB candidate text.

call_sizing_FIX5.fallback: if model context < ~64K, batch per condition (R0/RS/RS_pool/RS_flat = 60 candidates ~12K tokens each, <=4 calls), each with its own force_include + coverage assert; batching MUST be logged (not silent)
call_sizing_FIX5.verify_at_impl: confirm Qwen3.6-35B-A3B served context window before choosing 1-call vs batched

decoding.determinism_note: records raw output; feasibility does not assert bitwise determinism

forbidden_in_replay: feeding EGL ledgers into the corpus
expected_form: answer_dict with ANSWER_KEYS; answer_claims non-empty; open_gaps non-empty; validate_answer M1 source_trace completeness > 0 for answer_claims (open_gaps is NOT mechanically grounded).
success_definition: WIRING feasibility = (a) adapter produced records, (b) all fed records provably retrieved (coverage assert passed), (c) answer_question returned a valid ANSWER_KEYS object, (d) answer_claims and open_gaps both populated and coexisting, (e) validate_answer passed M1/M3 for answer_claims. NOT a claim the answer is correct or HBB-30 solved.
claim_ceiling: mechanism-feasibility only. No HBB-30 solved. No REC2. No Attention-Center. No structural re-centering. open_gaps grounding is out of scope. C != H.
